title: Gun Isekai
description: A ModPack focused on making the most Vanilla-Friendly Gun experience... (yes, "Guns" and "Vanilla-Friendly" in the same sentence)
body:
As the Summry said, This is a Vanilla-Friendly (More like Vanilla++) ModPack Focoust on adding a Proper Gun experience.
Think of it as A Gun Isekai of a tactical team getting thrown into the world of Minecraft.

It mainly came to be because I adding the whole Dungeons and Taverns sweet of mods and mixed it with Vic's PointBlank and it gave this uncanly perfect vibe that somehow made the guns work in Minecraft.

And whats even cool about it is that it felt, FUN and wasn't THAT Overpowerd to the Vanilla 
experience, but it still needed a few tweeks.. and thats where THIS ModPack comes in OWO!
___________

Now, Even tho I had to do the harsh choise of using the TaCZ Mod (The cool kid of Gun mods) instied of PointBlank (THE defacto Best Vanilla-Friendly Gun Mod) Mainly becouse PB had problems with a few shaders and an interactions with another mod...
I kept the idea of "Keep It as Vanilla-Friendly as posible" is still there.
from adding things that just make the game both Look and FEEL better without overbloating it, WHILE also making sure that the game would STILL be chalanging enough to make Guns feel less of an Overkill tool and more of an actual extension of the base weapon system of minecraft. (or as much as Fabric 1.21.1 can allow.)

Speacking of whitch... Yes, this modpack is a Fabric Loader 1.21.1 Why?... Cuz it's stable...
tho I would've loved for some Forge-Only mods to be ported to Fabric like Tactical armor mods and more Boss-forcusd Mods to add even more of a challenge... BUT... Fabric 1.21.1 have ONE important type of mods that are not avalible on Forge (Or at least not as much and as polished as the Fabric ones), and thats...
Vanilla-Friendly Structure Mods.

Thats why I choose this version of the game.

NOW, As for what you SHOULD Expect from the ModPack..
Extream weather. (For maximum Aura Farming)
* Populated Structures.
* Harder Pillagers and Raids. (maybe even some AIR-RAIDS)
* More Mobs, Bosses, Armor and Loot
* Exploration-Heavy Adventure.
* And of course, Good Guns OwO

Sooo, This is it owo. Hope you enjoy it.
(also, most screenshots uses the Complementary Reimagined Shaders.)
Also Also... **PLEASE Open Settings to change both Video Settings and Keybinds for your liking** and to minimize chances of Crashes and errors cuz of its being too high for some of your PCs. (definintly not becouse I had all settings set to Fancy with 22 Chunks before uploding the ModPack...... yah.. )
